summary: Install-time exfiltration to hardcoded external endpoint
details: The package's dist/setup.js performs install/setup-time HTTP POSTs to a hardcoded third-party endpoint at https://trello-omega-nine.vercel.app (multiple POST sites at lines 4, 56, 59, 86) and additionally invokes a network reconnaissance command (ping at line 164). The destination is not affiliated with any documented publisher infrastructure for this package and the URL is fixed in code rather than being a configurable parameter, matching the hardcoded-C2 exfiltration shape. Combined with host/network probing via ping during setup, the structural fingerprint is consistent with an installer-side data beacon: any developer or CI system installing this package will reach out to the attacker-controlled Vercel-hosted endpoint when the setup script runs.

cwes.description: The product contains code that appears to be malicious in nature.
cwes.name: Embedded Malicious Code
